sanskrit:
यथैधांसि समिद्धोऽग्निर्भस्मसात्कुरुतेऽर्जुन।
ज्ञानाग्निः सर्वकर्माणि भस्मसात्कुरुते तथा॥
transliteration:
yathaidhāṁsi samiddho 'gnir bhasmasāt kurute 'rjuna |
jñānāgniḥ sarva-karmāṇi bhasmasāt kurute tathā ||
literal_meaning: Just as a blazing fire turns fuel to ashes, O Arjuna, so the fire of knowledge reduces all actions to ashes.
contextual_meaning: The moment self-knowledge is firmly established, the binding power of past karmas is incinerated; liberation is immediate and irreversible.
anchor_text: Knowledge-fire burns the seeds of karma, freeing you from guilt and future bondage.
psychological_state: Post-traumatic growth: survivor sheds residual guilt, re-authoring life narrative from victim to free agent.
trigger_scenario: Client finally grasps core self is unblemished; intrusive ruminations about past mistakes lose charge.
